SUMMARY: NESTED | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL: FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
Interface FileFormatConstants

public interface FileFormatConstants

Defines the Values applicable to Player.FILE_FORMAT and Recorder.FILE_FORMAT.

Field Summary
static Value FORMAT_3G2
          3gpp2 files format.
static Value FORMAT_3GP
          3gp files format.
static Value GSM
          GSM file format.
static Value INFERRED
          If Player.FILE_FORMAT or Recorder.FILE_FORMAT is set to this Value, it indicates that the container type must be inferred from the file name extension (.wav -> WAV_FORMAT, etc..).
static Value RAW
          Basic file format without any header.
static Value WAV
          WAV file format.
 

Field Detail

RAW

static final Value RAW
Basic file format without any header.

WAV

static final Value WAV
WAV file format. Default value inferred if the file extension is ".wav"

GSM

static final Value GSM
GSM file format.

The only supported AUDIO_CODEC value is CodecConstants.GSM

FORMAT_3GP

static final Value FORMAT_3GP
3gp files format. Default value inferred if the file extension is ".3gp"

FORMAT_3G2

static final Value FORMAT_3G2
3gpp2 files format. Default value inferred if the file extension is ".3g2" or ".3gpp2"

INFERRED

static final Value INFERRED
If Player.FILE_FORMAT or Recorder.FILE_FORMAT is set to this Value, it indicates that the container type must be inferred from the file name extension (.wav -> WAV_FORMAT, etc..).

Note: It is the default action anyway; this Value is mostly useful to cancel a previous explicit request for a specific format/codec.
